title: VAERS limitations
script_summary: Exploring the limitations of VAERS reveals a more complex truth than social media suggests.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about VAERS limitations than social media does.
VAERS, or the Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System, collects data on vaccine side effects.
But here’s the catch: VAERS reports can be incomplete and unverified.
Studies show that many reports are coincidental, not causal. Context matters.
Understanding these limitations helps us see the bigger picture—vaccines are still safe and effective.
Stay informed. Like and share for more insights on health and science.

Understanding these limitations helps us see the bigger picture—vaccines are still safe and effective. Stay informed. Like and share for more insights on health and science.
